metadata.title: NO MERCY, ALL SPEED 💥
metadata.description: Two stickmen. One blade each. Lightning-fast footwork, anime-level slashes, and a final beatdown that ends the duel in a blink. Drop a 🔥 if you want more stickman battles—comment who wins this duel, like and follow for daily stickman fights, and share with a fellow animation fan! #stickmanfight #animation #swordfight #anime #action #stickman #fightchoreography #minimalist #battle #speed #power #nomercy #duel
